sast.rationale: Repository-owned API evidence must show both CodeQL language analyses for every sampled default-branch commit before the Scorecard heuristic alert can be treated as a false positive.

expectedWarnings: 'branch protection settings apply to administrators' is disabled on branch 'main'
'stale review dismissal' is disabled on branch 'main'
codeowners review is not required on branch 'main'
'last push approval' is disabled on branch 'main'
compensatingControls: six strict required checks must pass
force pushes and branch deletion are blocked
bot and agent findings are triaged with compensating manual review evidence
strongerApprovalTriggers: a second qualified maintainer becomes reliably available
the repository gains multiple active human contributors
administrator bypass expands beyond pull-request merges
a high-risk release or credential change lacks independent review
